name: Protected Media
description: Mobile, display and CTV ad verification platform detecting ad fraud, invalid traffic, viewability issues and brand safety threats.

seo.title: Protected Media — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Protected Media: Mobile, display and CTV ad verification platform detecting ad fraud, invalid traffic, viewability issues and brand safety threats.

when_to_use: Detecting invalid traffic and ad fraud in mobile UA campaigns
Viewability measurement for in-app display advertising
Brand safety verification for CTV and mobile video inventory

pros: Combined IVT, viewability and brand safety in one
Covers CTV in addition to web and mobile
Pricing competitive versus DoubleVerify and IAS
cons: Not an MMP, so attribution lives elsewhere
Smaller brand than Tier-1 verification vendors
review.verdict: Practical verification vendor for buyers who find DV and IAS too heavy, though it is not attribution.
review.best_for: Mid-market advertisers needing IVT, viewability and brand safety without Tier-1 pricing.
review.not_for: Teams expecting install attribution or MMP-style postbacks from this tool.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
